g.text: 1. Mobile and Web app both connect to order service QM

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Order, Payment, Shipping, Notification Services connect to multiple QAs

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Hard to manage, secure and automate

g.text: 2. Apps connect only to their own QM

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Producers write to a remote queue in their own QM

g.text: 4. Remote queue uses a transmission queue to send to consumer's QM
